final:
module RefModule (
    input wire clk,
    input wire enable,
    input wire data,
    output reg q
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (enable) begin
            q <= data; // Write data to EEPROM cell
        end
    end
endmodule
